# 📦 [Your-Repo-Name]

A high-performance shipment tracking API built with **FastAPI** and **Python**. This service allows users to manage delivery routes, track carrier assignments, and monitor real-time package statuses.

## 🚀 Features

*   **Real-time Tracking**: Monitor package status and location history.
*   **Route Management**: Define and optimize delivery paths.
*   **Carrier Integration**: Assign and track shipments by carrier.
*   **Auto-Generated Docs**: Interactive API documentation via Swagger UI.

## 🛠️ Tech Stack

*   **Framework**: [FastAPI](https://fastapi.tiangolo.com/)
*   **Validation**: [Pydantic](https://docs.pydantic.dev)
*   **Database**: [SQLAlchemy / SQLModel / PostgreSQL] (Specify yours)
*   **Server**: [Uvicorn](https://www.uvicorn.org)
